Groth16 is computationally sound under the q-SDH and d-PKE assumptions.   - BN254 supports 128-bit security level (NIST recommendation).   - The verifying key is baked into the contract \u2014 upgrading requires redeployment.","details":"Implements ZKP.Verify(\u03c0, x) from paper \u00a7VIII.B (Signing Phase) and \u00a7IX      (On-Chain Attestation) using Ethereum's BN254 precompiles (EIP-196/197). Paper references:   \u00a7III.B  co-SNARK: ZKP.Verify(\u03c0_HSP, rand) = 1   \u00a7V      PGP:      ZKP.Verify(\u03c0_pgp, b) = 1   \u00a7IX     On-chain: smart contract verifies FROST \u03c3 + Groth16 \u03c0 Groth16 verification equation (BN254):   e(\u03c0.A, \u03c0.B) \u00b7 e(vk.\u03b1_neg, vk.\u03b2) \u00b7 e(\u03a3_vk, vk.\u03b3) \u00b7 e(\u03c0.C_neg, vk.\u03b4) == 1 where \u03a3_vk = \u03a3_{i=0}^{n} public_inputs[i] \u00b7 vk.IC[i] Implemented using:   EIP-196 (0x06/0x07): bn256Add, bn256ScalarMul  \u2014 G1 arithmetic   EIP-197 (0x08):      bn256Pairing               \u2014 pairing product check Gas cost estimate (BN254 pairing, 4 pairs):   45,000 + 4 \u00d7 34,000 = ~181,000 gas per Groth16 verify call.","kind":"dev","methods":{"setHspMode1VK((uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256),uint256[2][3])":{"details":"Called once setHspMode1VK((uint256,uint256,uint256,u.details: Called once after deployment with the VK exported from Rust:      `CoSnarkCrs::setup().pvk` serialized to BN254 affine coordinates.

verifyFullAttestation((uint256,uint256,u.details: Reverts on any failed proof rather than returning false, making      the function usable as a precondition in downstream contracts.

returns.valid: true iff the proof is valid.

params.pmsHash: SHA256(PMS) as a BN254 Fr element.

returns.valid: true iff the proof is valid.
true iff the proof is valid.

setHspMode1VK((uint256,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Register the π_HSP Mode 1 verifying key.

setHspMode2VK((uint256,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Register the π_HSP Mode 2 verifying key.

setSessionBindingVK((uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Register the π_θs session binding verifying key.

verifyFullAttestation((uint256,uint256,u.notice: Verify all three proofs atomically. Full attestation check per paper §IX: a single transaction verifies π_HSP (Mode 2), π_θs, and their shared commitment consistency.

verifyHspMode1((uint256,uint256,uint256,.notice: Verify π_HSP Mode 1 on-chain. Implements paper §VIII.B: ZKP.Verify(π_HSP, rand) = 1

verifyHspMode2((uint256,uint256,uint256,.notice: Verify π_HSP Mode 2 on-chain (with PMS binding).

verifySessionBinding((uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Verify π_θs (session secret binding) on-chain. Implements paper §V: proves K_MAC authenticated TLS query + response.

vkHspMode1().notice: Verifying key for π_HSP (Mode 1 — K_MAC commitment).   Public inputs: [k_mac_commitment_fe, rand_binding_fe]

vkHspMode2().notice: Verifying key for π_HSP (Mode 2 — full TLS-PRF + PMS binding).   Public inputs: [k_mac_commitment_fe, rand_binding_fe, pms_hash_fe]

vkSessionBinding().notice: Verifying key for π_θs (session secret binding).   Public inputs: [k_mac_commitment_fe, rand_binding_fe,                   mac_commitment_q_fe, mac_commitment_r_fe]
